title: QuestionChoices
description: The choice map for a `Question` whose `question_type` is `radio`, `select`, or `multi_select`. Keys are the stored value (what an answer records); values are the display label shown to a respondent. Persisted as a JSONB column on the questions table. Schema is referenced by the OpenAPI spec's Question/UpdateQuestionRequest types.

additionalProperties.description: Display label for the keyed choice value.
